description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:22-alpine3.20 Docker image. Define two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs the shared before_script to install git via apk and install dependencies with npm ci, then executes npm run-script build:ci, and is excluded from tag pipelines. In the release stage add a release job that also runs the shared before_script, then runs npm run-script build followed by node_modules/.bin/semantic-release, and is limited to the master branch of the timrs2998/newsie project. No services, caches, or artifacts are defined.
